chattranslation.config.title: Chat Translation Config
chattranslation.config.target_language.t: Language to translate chat messages to. Use 'auto' to follow each player's Minecraft language setting.
chattranslation.config.translation_servi: Choose between Google Translate (free) or Bing Translator (requires API key).
chattranslation.config.bing_api_key.tool: Your Microsoft Azure Translator API key. Required only when using Bing.
chattranslation.config.bing_region.toolt: Azure region for Bing Translator (e.g., global, eastasia, westeurope).
chattranslation.config.show_original.too: Whether to keep showing the original message alongside the translation.
chattranslation.config.translation_forma: Format for translated messages. Use {message} for translated text and {original} for original.
chattranslation.config.translate_all_mes: Translate all chat messages or only those in foreign languages.
